extensionName.description: Name of the extension shown in Chrome extension management

extensionDescription.description: Description of the extension shown in Chrome extension management

zipReadMeTxt.message: To explore the Google Docs process, please load this ZIP file at https://app.processfeedback.org/gdocs
zipReadMeTxt.description: Content of readme.txt file included in downloaded ZIP

tooFewChangesAlert.message:
Not enough editing activity!

This document has fewer than 10 edits, which isn't enough to generate a process report.

Type for at least 10 more seconds and then try again.
tooFewChangesAlert.description: Alert shown when document has insufficient edits to generate a report

popupTitle.description: Main title shown in the extension popup header

popupDescription.message:
This extension shows the edit history of a Google Docs document. Please read more at
Process Feedback's

popupHyperlinkTextToProcessFeedbackGoogl.description: Link text for Process Feedback Google Docs page (unused)

popupRibbonSettingTitle.description: Section header for ribbon settings in popup

popupRibbonSettingRibbonModeTitle.description: Label for ribbon display mode dropdown in popup

popupRibbonSettingRibbonModeOptionAlways.description: Dropdown option to always show the ribbon

popupRibbonSettingRibbonModeOptionFallba.description: Dropdown option to show button instead of ribbon

popupRibbonSettingRibbonModeOptionNever.description: Dropdown option to never show the ribbon

popupRibbonSettingCheckboxTitleToNotShow.message: Do not show editing time in ribbon
popupRibbonSettingCheckboxTitleToNotShow.description: Checkbox label to hide typing time from ribbon

popupRibbonSettingDropdownTooltip.message: Determines whether or not and when the long ribbon below the toolbar is shown
popupRibbonSettingDropdownTooltip.description: Tooltip for ribbon display mode dropdown

popupRibbonSettingCheckboxTitleToNotShow.message: Check this to hide editing time in ribbon (makes the ribbon load faster)
popupRibbonSettingCheckboxTitleToNotShow.description: Tooltip for hide typing time checkbox

popupRibbonSettingDisabledByInstantDownl.message: This setting cannot be changed while instant download is enabled. Turn off "Instantly download process data" to update ribbon settings.
popupRibbonSettingDisabledByInstantDownl.description: Alert shown when trying to change ribbon settings while instant download is enabled

popupRibbonSettingDisabledByInstantDownl.message: To remove the ribbon, first pin the Process Feedback extension and then, in the settings, uncheck "Instantly download process data".
popupRibbonSettingDisabledByInstantDownl.description: Alert shown when trying to close ribbon while instant download is enabled

popupOtherSettingTitle.description: Section header for other settings in popup

popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToIncludeC.message: Include comments in this document in the writing process report
popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToIncludeC.description: Checkbox label to include document comments in the report

popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToIncludeC.message: Check this to include comments (suggestions) made by authors and to see them in the process report.

popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToDownload.description: First part of download checkbox label (unused)
Second part of download checkbox label (unused)

popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToDownload.message: This changes the behavior of the Explore Process button. It downloads a ZIP file containing process data for sharing.
popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToDownload.description: Tooltip for download process data checkbox (unused)

popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToDirectOp.message: Don't show this popup next time; open the report directly
popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToDirectOp.description: Full checkbox label to skip popup (used in explore modal)
Short checkbox label to skip popup (used in popup settings)

popupOtherSettingCheckboxTitleToDirectOp.message: Check this to skip this popup and directly open the report in a new tab when clicking the Explore Process button.

popupOtherSettingAutomaticDownloadProces.description: Checkbox label for automatic download on document open

popupOtherSettingAutomaticDownloadProces.message: Check this to automatically download the process data ZIP when a document is opened. Reloads all open document tabs. Helpful for viewing lots of reports in the teacher dashboard.

popupOtherSettingStopOpeningNewTabWhenDo.message: Don't open a new tab when downloading process data
popupOtherSettingStopOpeningNewTabWhenDo.description: Full checkbox label to suppress new tab on download (used in explore modal)
Short checkbox label to suppress new tab (used in popup settings)

popupOtherSettingStopOpeningNewTabWhenDo.message: Check this to stop opening a new tab when downloading the process data ZIP file.
popupOtherSettingStopOpeningNewTabWhenDo.description: Tooltip for suppress new tab checkbox

popupDevelopedBy.description: Footer text prefix before developer link (unused)

buttonIntialLoadText.description: Button text shown while extension is initializing

buttonIntialLoadTitle.description: Button tooltip shown while extension is initializing

buttonTextDownload.description: Button text for downloading process data ZIP

buttonTitleDownload.message: Downloads the writing process data ZIP for this document.

buttonTextExplore.description: Button text for exploring the writing process

buttonOpenReport.description: Button text for opening the report (unused)

buttonTitleExplore.message: Opens the writing process of this document in a new tab, locally, without sharing data

buttonTextNoAccess.description: Button text when document access is denied (unused)

buttonTitleNoAccess.message: Cannot show the writing process! This document is read-only, you are offline, or there's an unknown issue. If needed, please contact support.
buttonTitleNoAccess.description: Button tooltip when document access is denied (unused)

buttonTextDownloadLoading.description: Button text while downloading process data

buttonTextExploreLoading.description: Button text while opening the report

buttonTextExploreError.description: Button text when opening report fails (unused)

ribbonLoading.description: Ribbon text shown while loading document data

ribbonNoAccess.message: Document is read-only or offline! Exploring the process requires edit access.
ribbonNoAccess.description: Ribbon message when document access is denied (unused)

ribbonAuthorsName.description: Label for authors count statistic in ribbon

ribbonEditsName.description: Label for edits count statistic in ribbon

ribbonAuthorsTitle.message: Number of people who changed the document. Explore the full process to see the details.

ribbonEditsTitle.message: Total changes made in the entire document (all tabs in the document)

ribbonEditsTooltip.message: Approximate number of edits (all tabs); view the full process to see the details.
ribbonEditsTooltip.description: Info tooltip for edits statistic in ribbon

ribbonTypingTimeTooltip.message: Editing time of the entire document (all tabs); view the full process to see editing time for individual tabs.
ribbonTypingTimeTooltip.description: Info tooltip for typing time statistic in ribbon

exploreModalSettingsInstructions.message: To open more extension settings, 1) click on the jigsaw puzzle piece icon on the right of the address bar, 2) find the blue PF icon and pin it, and 3) click on the blue PF icon. For example, if you don't like the long ribbon, you can replace it with a small button.
